title: Noon Credit Card
description: Discover the benefits of the Mashreq Noon Credit Card, including cashback, welcome bonuses, free delivery, and more.
mainContent: AED 500 Welcome Bonus for new credit card customers on spending AED 5,000 within the first 2 months. Existing customers receive AED 100. Enjoy unlimited free next day delivery across UAE on noon express orders. Earn accelerated cashback: 5% on most purchases, 0.33% on utilities. Instant Digital Card available for immediate use. No annual fees and transparency in conditions. See terms and conditions for more details.
headings: Enjoy unlimited free next day delivery across UAE on all noon express orders.

5% cashback on noon, noon Food and noon Minutes - 5% cashback on noon supermall, NowNow and Namshi - 0.33% cashback on govt. payments, utilities, education, charity, fuel, rental and telecom purchases -1% cashback on all other purchases
Annual fee - Free for life - Interest rates 3.85% p.m - Interest free period Up to 57 days - PayProtect insurance 0.99% of your monthly statement balance
Instant Digital Card No need to wait for card delivery to start shopping any more with the new Mashreq Instant Digital Card.
Free for life - No annual fees on primary and supplementary cards.
